message:
fix(abi): change default locale codeset from ANSI_X3.4-1968 to UTF-8

Modern Linux systems default to UTF-8, and programs overwhelmingly
expect UTF-8 for correct string handling. Returning the POSIX C
locale's ANSI_X3.4-1968 (ASCII) from nl_langinfo(CODESET) caused
programs to mishandle multi-byte characters. Switch the static
codeset to UTF-8 to match real-world glibc behavior on modern
distributions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
